sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91014" key="prwtonu/mfeutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτο-νύμφευτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">just married</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callicrat.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.28.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
